items.docs: Returns a list of datasets from the user's My Workspace. Each dataset includes metadata such as name, configuration settings, and whether it is a push dataset or refreshable.

info.name: Power Bi Create a Push Dataset

params.name: defaultRetentionPolicy
params.description: The default retention policy for the dataset

items.docs: Creates a new push dataset in the user's My Workspace. Push datasets allow applications to push data directly into Power BI in real time without needing a data source or scheduled refresh.

params.name: datasetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dataset

items.docs: Returns the specified dataset from the user's My Workspace, including its configuration, tables, and data source details.

params.name: datasetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dataset

items.docs: Deletes the specified dataset from the user's My Workspace. This also deletes all reports and dashboard tiles that are built on the dataset.

params.name: datasetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dataset

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of refresh entries to return

items.docs: Returns the refresh history for the specified dataset. The response includes the status, start time, and end time of each refresh operation.

info.name: Power Bi Trigger a Dataset Refresh

params.name: datasetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dataset

items.docs: Triggers a refresh for the specified dataset. For enhanced refresh capabilities, include a request body specifying tables, partitions, or the type of refresh.

params.name: datasetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dataset

items.docs: Returns a list of data sources for the specified dataset. Each data source includes connection details such as the server, database, and data source type.

params.name: datasetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dataset

items.docs: Returns a list of parameters for the specified dataset. Parameters allow dynamic configuration of data source connections and query behavior.

params.name: datasetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dataset

items.docs: Updates the values of one or more parameters for the specified dataset. After updating parameters, a dataset refresh is required for the new values to take effect.

info.name: Power Bi List Datasets in a Workspace

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

items.docs: Returns a list of datasets from the specified workspace. This is similar to the My Workspace datasets endpoint but scoped to a specific workspace.
Returns a list of reports from the user's My Workspace. Each report includes metadata such as name, the associated dataset, web URL, and embed URL for embedding scenarios.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier of the report

items.docs: Returns the specified report from the user's My Workspace, including its name, dataset binding, web URL, and embed URL.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier of the report

items.docs: Deletes the specified report from the user's My Workspace. This does not delete the underlying dataset.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier of the report

items.docs: Clones the specified report from the user's My Workspace. The clone can be placed in a different workspace and optionally rebound to a different dataset.

info.name: Power Bi Rebind a Report to a Dataset

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier of the report

items.docs: Rebinds the specified report to a different dataset. The target dataset must have the same schema as the current dataset.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier of the report

items.docs: Exports the specified report as a PBIX file. Only reports created from PBIX files can be exported. Reports created from the Power BI service are not supported.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier of the report

items.docs: Returns a list of pages within the specified report. Each page includes its name, display name, and order within the report.
Returns a list of dashboards from the user's My Workspace. Each dashboard includes its name, web URL, embed URL, and whether it is read-only.
Creates a new empty dashboard in the user's My Workspace. After creating the dashboard, use tile pinning to add content.

params.name: dashboardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dashboard

items.docs: Returns the specified dashboard from the user's My Workspace, including its name, embed URL, and configuration.

params.name: dashboardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dashboard

items.docs: Returns a list of tiles within the specified dashboard. Each tile represents a pinned visualization and includes its embed URL, report and dataset references, and configuration.

info.name: Power Bi Get a Dashboard Tile

params.name: dashboardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the dashboard

params.name: tileId
params.description: The unique identifier of the tile

items.docs: Returns the specified tile from the specified dashboard, including its embed URL and configuration details.

info.name: Power Bi List Dashboards in a Workspace

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

items.docs: Returns a list of dashboards from the specified workspace.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to filter workspaces

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of workspaces to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of workspaces to skip

items.docs: Returns a list of workspaces (groups) the user has access to. Each workspace includes its name, type, and whether it is read-only or on a dedicated capacity.
Creates a new workspace (group). The workspace can be assigned to a Premium capacity for enhanced features and performance.

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

items.docs: Deletes the specified workspace. All content within the workspace including dashboards, reports, and datasets will be permanently removed.

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

items.docs: Returns a list of users who have access to the specified workspace, including their display name, email address, and access rights.

info.name: Power Bi Add a Workspace User

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

items.docs: Grants the specified user access to the workspace with the given access right (Admin, Member, Contributor, or Viewer).

info.name: Power Bi Update Workspace User Access

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

params.name: userId
params.description: The email address or object ID of the user

items.docs: Updates the access right for the specified user in the workspace.

info.name: Power Bi Remove a Workspace User

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

params.name: userId
params.description: The email address or object ID of the user

items.docs: Removes the specified user from the workspace, revoking all access.

info.name: Power Bi List Reports in a Workspace

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

items.docs: Returns a list of reports from the specified workspace. Each report includes its metadata and embed information.

info.name: Power Bi List Imports in a Workspace

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

items.docs: Returns a list of import operations for the specified workspace, including their status and the type of content imported.

info.name: Power Bi Import Content Into a Workspace

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace (group)

params.name: datasetDisplayName
params.description: Display name of the dataset

params.name: nameConflict
params.description: Action to take if a dataset with the same name exists

items.docs: Imports a Power BI PBIX file, Excel workbook, or other supported content into the specified workspace. The file must be uploaded as multipart form data.
Returns a list of on-premises data gateways that the user has permissions to administer. Each gateway includes its cluster information and public key for credential encryption.

params.name: gatewayId
params.description: The unique identifier of the gateway

items.docs: Returns the specified on-premises data gateway.

info.name: Power Bi List Gateway Data Sources

params.name: gatewayId
params.description: The unique identifier of the gateway

items.docs: Returns a list of data sources configured on the specified gateway.
